function.name: compare_stocks
function.description: Compare multiple stocks by current price and daily movement.
function.long_description: Retrieves live quote summaries for multiple stock symbols and highlights best and worst daily performers using percentage change.

symbols.description: List of stock symbols to compare

example_user_queries: Which performed better today: TSLA or NVDA?
Compare these stocks by daily change
Show stock comparison for AMZN META NFLX
Get best and worst performer for this list
